summary: POS System Dynamic Tax Names and Config Updates - All 7 features verified. Backend APIs for receipts/pre-check use dynamic tax names from tax_breakdown/tax_config. Frontend ThermalTicket, PaymentScreen, and SystemTab correctly implement dynamic taxes and expanded config fields. No 'Sugerida' found in codebase. .ticket-total has correct white bg with black border.
passed_tests: TEST 1: System config API accepts 4 address fields (street, building, sector, city) ✅
TEST 2: System config API accepts 4 footer message fields (msg1-4) ✅
TEST 3: Receipt HTML has no 'Sugerida', TOTAL A PAGAR has border:2px solid (white bg) ✅
TEST 4: Receipt ESC/POS uses dynamic tax names from tax_breakdown ✅
TEST 5: Pre-check HTML has no 'Sugerida', uses dynamic tax names from tax_config ✅
TEST 6: CSS .ticket-total has background: #fff with border: 2px solid #000 (not black bg) ✅
TEST 7: SystemTab.js has 4 address fields with data-testid attributes ✅
TEST 8: SystemTab.js has 4 footer message fields with data-testid attributes ✅
TEST 9: PaymentScreen.js has no hardcoded tax names, uses tax_breakdown/taxConfig ✅
TEST 10: ThermalTicket.js uses tax_breakdown.map() for dynamic tax names ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py print_receipt (line 969-978) correctly uses bill.tax_breakdown for dynamic tax names
Backend server.py print_receipt_escpos (line 1032-1040) correctly uses bill.tax_breakdown for ESC/POS
Backend server.py print_pre_check (line 843-856) correctly fetches tax_config for dynamic descriptions
Frontend ThermalTicket.js (line 259-269) correctly maps over tax_breakdown with tax.description
Frontend PaymentScreen.js uses adjustedBill?.tax_breakdown for dynamic tax display
Frontend SystemTab.js has all 8 required input fields with proper data-testid attributes
CSS ticket-print.css .ticket-total has white bg (#fff) with border: 2px solid #000 - correctly redesigned

features_verified.dynamic_tax_names_no_sugerida: PASS - All 'Sugerida' removed, uses tax descriptions from config
features_verified.total_block_redesign: PASS - .ticket-total has white bg (#fff) with border: 2px solid #000
features_verified.expanded_address_fields: PASS - 4 fields: street, building, sector, city
features_verified.footer_message_fields: PASS - 4 fields: msg1, msg2, msg3, msg4
features_verified.receipt_html_dynamic_taxes: PASS - Uses tax_breakdown for tax names
features_verified.receipt_escpos_dynamic_taxes: PASS - Uses tax_breakdown for ESC/POS commands

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic tax names feature verified. All hardcoded 'ITBIS 18%', 'Propina Legal 10%', 'Propina Sugerida' replaced with dynamic names from tax_breakdown or tax_config. The tax_config collection stores taxes with 'description' field which gets propagated to bills via tax_breakdown array. Receipt/pre-check endpoints now render taxes using this description. TOTAL block correctly redesigned from black bg to white bg with black border. Settings page has 8 new fields (4 address, 4 footer) for ticket customization.
